Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.

Local Open Scope cat.

(* Defines a bicategory from a monoidal category. *)
Section Bicat_From_Monoidal_Cat.

Context (M : monoidal_cat).
Let pM := monoidal_cat_cat M.
Let I := monoidal_cat_unit M.
Let tensor := monoidal_cat_tensor M.
Let α := monoidal_cat_associator M.
Let l := monoidal_cat_left_unitor M.
Let ρ := monoidal_cat_right_unitor M.
Let triangle_equality := pr1 (pr222 (pr222 M)).
Let pentagon_equation := pr2 (pr222 (pr222 M)).

Notation "X ⊗ Y" := (tensor (X, Y)).
Notation "f #⊗ g" := (#tensor (f #, g)) (at level 31).

Local Notation "f '==>' g" := (prebicat_cells _ f g) (at level 60).
Local Notation "f '<==' g" := (prebicat_cells _ g f) (at level 60, only parsing).


(* The type of 0-cells is unit type and the 1-cells are the objects of the monoidal category. The
 2-cells are given by the morphisms of the original monoidal category. *)

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
precategory_data

tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M

l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
precategory_data

tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr222 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

Defined.

Definition two_cells_from_monoidal : prebicat_2cell_struct (one_cells_data_from_monoidal)
  := λ _ _ a b, pM ⟦ a , b⟧.

α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

∏
(a
 b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
     two_cells_from_monoidal)
(f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
      two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏
 (a
  b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
      two_cells_from_monoidal)
 (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
       two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 id a · f ==> f)
× (∏
   (a
    b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
        two_cells_from_monoidal)
   (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
         two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   f · id b ==> f)
  × (∏
     (a
      b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
          two_cells_from_monoidal)
     (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
           two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     f ==> id a · f)
    × (∏
       (a
        b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
            two_cells_from_monoidal)
       (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
             two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       f ==> f · id b)
      × (∏
         (a b c
          d : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
              two_cells_from_monoidal)
         (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
               two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
               two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
               two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
         f · g · h ==> f · (g · h))
        × (∏
           (a b c
            d : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                two_cells_from_monoidal)
           (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                 two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                 two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                 two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
           f · (g · h) ==> f · g · h)
          × (∏
             (a
              b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                  two_cells_from_monoidal)
             (f g
              h : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                   two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h)
            × (∏
               (a b
                c : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                    two_cells_from_monoidal)
               (f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                     two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (g1
                g2 : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                      two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ b, c
                     ⟧), 
               g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2)
              × (∏
                 (a b
                  c : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                      two_cells_from_monoidal)
                 (f1
                  f2 : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                       two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b
                       ⟧)
                 (g : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
                       two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ b, c
                      ⟧),
                 f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏
(a
 b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
     two_cells_from_monoidal)
(f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
      two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f

pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))

(a
 b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
     two_cells_from_monoidal)
(f : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
      two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f · id b ==> f

ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
two_cells_from_monoidal
f: (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
 two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧
f ==> f · id b
 apply (nat_z_iso_inv ρ).

        two_cells_from_monoidal)
   (f1
    f2 : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
          two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : (one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,
         two_cells_from_monoidal) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))

(a
 b : one_cells_data_from_monoidal,,

(f g

f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h

Defined.


M: monoidal_cat

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

  (* 1. Identities. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), vcomp2 (id2 f) x = x
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g), vcomp2 x (id2 g) = x)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) 
   (z : h ==> k),
   vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z)
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g h
          i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
         lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f g
            h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g) 
           (y : g ==> h),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
           rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
             vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
               vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
               vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h
                  i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) 
                 (x : h ==> i),
                 vcomp2 
                   (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
                   (lassociator f g i) =
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f g h)
                   (lwhisker (f · g) x))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (g
                    h : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
                   (i : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
                   vcomp2 
                     (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                     (lassociator f h i) =
                   vcomp2 
                     (lassociator f g i)
                     (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f
                      g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (h : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                     (i : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) 
                     (x : f ==> g),
                     vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f h i)
                       (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                     vcomp2 
                       (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                       (lassociator g h i))
                    × (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f
                       g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (h
                       i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧) 
                       (x : f ==> g) 
                       (y : h ==> i),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rwhisker h x) 
                       (lwhisker g y) =
                       vcomp2 
                       (lwhisker f y) 
                       (rwhisker i x))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lunitor f) 
                       (linvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (id a · f))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (linvunitor f) 
                       (lunitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (runitor f) 
                       (rinvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (f · id b))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rinvunitor f) 
                       (runitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2 
                       (lwhisker f ...)
                       (lassociator f ... i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), vcomp2 (id2 f) x = x
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 (id2 f) x = x
 apply id_left. 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g), vcomp2 x (id2 g) = x)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
   vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z)
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g h
          i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
         lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f g
            h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
           rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
             vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
               vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
               vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h
                  i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) (x : h ==> i),
                 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
                   (lassociator f g i) =
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                   (lwhisker (f · g) x))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (g
                    h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
                   vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                     (lassociator f h i) =
                   vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
                     (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f
                      g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
                     vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
                       (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                     vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                       (lassociator g h i))
                    × (∏
                       (a b
                        c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f
                        g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (h
                        i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
                       (y : h ==> i),
                       vcomp2 (rwhisker h x)
                         (lwhisker g y) =
                       vcomp2 (lwhisker f y)
                         (rwhisker i x))
                      × (∏
                         (a
                          b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (lunitor f)
                           (linvunitor f) =
                         id2 (id a · f))
                        × (∏
                           (a
                            b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                           vcomp2 (linvunitor f)
                             (lunitor f) = id2 f)
                          × (∏
                             (a
                              b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                             vcomp2 (runitor f)
                               (rinvunitor f) =
                             id2 (f · id b))
                            × (∏
                               (a
                                b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                               vcomp2 (rinvunitor f)
                                 (runitor f) = id2 f)
                              × (∏
                                 (a b c
                                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                                 vcomp2
                                   (lassociator f g h)
                                   (rassociator f g h) =
                                 id2 (f · (g · h)))
                                × (∏
                                   (a b c
                                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                                   vcomp2
                                     (rassociator f g
                                        h)
                                     (lassociator f g
                                        h) =
                                   id2 (f · g · h))
                                  × (∏
                                     (a b
                                      c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                                     vcomp2
                                       (lassociator f
                                          (id b) g)
                                       (rwhisker g
                                          (runitor f)) =
                                     lwhisker f
                                       (lunitor g))
                                    × (∏
                                       (a b c d
                                        e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                            ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                            ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                                       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                            ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                                       vcomp2
                                         (vcomp2
                                            (lwhisker
                                               f ...)
                                            (lassociator
                                               f ... i))
                                         (rwhisker i
                                            (lassociator
                                               f g h)) =
                                       vcomp2
                                         (lassociator
                                            f g
                                            (h · i))
                                         (lassociator
                                            (f · g) h
                                            i))

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), vcomp2 x (id2 g) = x
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) 
 (z : h ==> k),
 vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z)
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
       lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g
          h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
         rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
           vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
             vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h
                i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : h ==> i),
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
                 (lassociator f g i) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                 (lwhisker (f · g) x))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g
                  h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) 
                 (x : g ==> h),
                 vcomp2 
                   (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                   (lassociator f h i) =
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f g i)
                   (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f
                    g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (h : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
                   (i : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
                   vcomp2 
                     (lassociator f h i)
                     (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                   vcomp2 
                     (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                     (lassociator g h i))
                  × (∏
                     (a b
                      c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f
                      g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (h
                      i : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧) 
                     (x : f ==> g) 
                     (y : h ==> i),
                     vcomp2 
                       (rwhisker h x) 
                       (lwhisker g y) =
                     vcomp2 
                       (lwhisker f y) 
                       (rwhisker i x))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lunitor f) 
                       (linvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (id a · f))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (linvunitor f) 
                       (lunitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (runitor f) 
                       (rinvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (f · id b))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rinvunitor f) 
                       (runitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2 
                       (lwhisker f (...))
                       (lassociator f (...) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), vcomp2 x (id2 g) = x
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 x (id2 g) = x
 apply id_right. 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
 vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z)
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
       lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g
          h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
         rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
           vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
             vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h
                i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : h ==> i),
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
                 (lassociator f g i) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                 (lwhisker (f · g) x))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g
                  h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
                 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                   (lassociator f h i) =
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
                   (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f
                    g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
                   vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
                     (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                   vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                     (lassociator g h i))
                  × (∏
                     (a b
                      c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f
                      g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (h
                      i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
                     (y : h ==> i),
                     vcomp2 (rwhisker h x)
                       (lwhisker g y) =
                     vcomp2 (lwhisker f y)
                       (rwhisker i x))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                        b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (lunitor f)
                         (linvunitor f) =
                       id2 (id a · f))
                      × (∏
                         (a
                          b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (linvunitor f)
                           (lunitor f) = id2 f)
                        × (∏
                           (a
                            b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                           vcomp2 (runitor f)
                             (rinvunitor f) =
                           id2 (f · id b))
                          × (∏
                             (a
                              b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                             vcomp2 (rinvunitor f)
                               (runitor f) = id2 f)
                            × (∏
                               (a b c
                                d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                               vcomp2
                                 (lassociator f g h)
                                 (rassociator f g h) =
                               id2 (f · (g · h)))
                              × (∏
                                 (a b c
                                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                                 vcomp2
                                   (rassociator f g h)
                                   (lassociator f g h) =
                                 id2 (f · g · h))
                                × (∏
                                   (a b
                                    c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                                   vcomp2
                                     (lassociator f
                                        (id b) g)
                                     (rwhisker g
                                        (runitor f)) =
                                   lwhisker f
                                     (lunitor g))
                                  × (∏
                                     (a b c d
                                      e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                                     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                          ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                                     vcomp2
                                       (vcomp2
                                          (lwhisker f
                                             (...))
                                          (lassociator
                                             f (...) i))
                                       (rwhisker i
                                          (lassociator
                                             f g h)) =
                                     vcomp2
                                       (lassociator f
                                          g (h · i))
                                       (lassociator
                                          (f · g) h i))


  (* 2. Vertical right associativity. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
     lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
       rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
         vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
           vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h
              i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : h ==> i),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
               (lassociator f g i) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
               (lwhisker (f · g) x))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g
                h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                 (lassociator f h i) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
                 (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f
                  g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) 
                 (x : f ==> g),
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f h i)
                   (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                 vcomp2 
                   (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                   (lassociator g h i))
                × (∏
                   (a b
                    c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f
                    g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (h
                    i : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g) 
                   (y : h ==> i),
                   vcomp2 
                     (rwhisker h x) 
                     (lwhisker g y) =
                   vcomp2 
                     (lwhisker f y) 
                     (rwhisker i x))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                     id2 (id a · f))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (linvunitor f) 
                       (lunitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (runitor f) 
                       (rinvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (f · id b))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rinvunitor f) 
                       (runitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g h k : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h, k: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
vcomp2 x (vcomp2 y z) = vcomp2 (vcomp2 x y) z
 apply assoc. 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
     lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
       rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
         vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
           vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h
              i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : h ==> i),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
               (lassociator f g i) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
               (lwhisker (f · g) x))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g
                h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
                 (lassociator f h i) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
                 (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f
                  g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
                   (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
                 vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                   (lassociator g h i))
                × (∏
                   (a b
                    c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f
                    g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (h
                    i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
                   (y : h ==> i),
                   vcomp2 (rwhisker h x)
                     (lwhisker g y) =
                   vcomp2 (lwhisker f y)
                     (rwhisker i x))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                     id2 (id a · f))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                        b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (linvunitor f)
                         (lunitor f) = id2 f)
                      × (∏
                         (a
                          b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (runitor f)
                           (rinvunitor f) =
                         id2 (f · id b))
                        × (∏
                           (a
                            b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                           vcomp2 (rinvunitor f)
                             (runitor f) = id2 f)
                          × (∏
                             (a b c
                              d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                             vcomp2
                               (lassociator f g h)
                               (rassociator f g h) =
                             id2 (f · (g · h)))
                            × (∏
                               (a b c
                                d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                               vcomp2
                                 (rassociator f g h)
                                 (lassociator f g h) =
                               id2 (f · g · h))
                              × (∏
                                 (a b
                                  c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                                 vcomp2
                                   (lassociator f
                                      (id b) g)
                                   (rwhisker g
                                      (runitor f)) =
                                 lwhisker f
                                   (lunitor g))
                                × (∏
                                   (a b c d
                                    e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                                   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                        ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                                   vcomp2
                                     (vcomp2
                                        (lwhisker f
                                           (lassociator
                                              g h i))
                                        (lassociator f
                                           (g · h) i))
                                     (rwhisker i
                                        (lassociator f
                                           g h)) =
                                   vcomp2
                                     (lassociator f g
                                        (h · i))
                                     (lassociator
                                        (f · g) h i))


  (* 3. Whiskering and identities. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
   lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
     rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
       vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
         vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h
            i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : h ==> i),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
             (lassociator f g i) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
             (lwhisker (f · g) x))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g
              h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : g ==> h),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
               (lassociator f h i) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
               (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
                 (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
               vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                 (lassociator g h i))
              × (∏
                 (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f
                  g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (h
                  i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧) 
                 (x : f ==> g) 
                 (y : h ==> i),
                 vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
                 vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                   id2 (id a · f))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                     id2 f)
                    × (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (runitor f) 
                       (rinvunitor f) = 
                       id2 (f · id b))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rinvunitor f) 
                       (runitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
