                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
lwhisker f (id2 g) = id2 (f · g)
 exact (functor_id tensor (f , g)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
   lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
     rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
       vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
         vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h
            i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : h ==> i),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
             (lassociator f g i) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
             (lwhisker (f · g) x))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g
              h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : g ==> h),
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
               (lassociator f h i) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
               (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
                 (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
               vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
                 (lassociator g h i))
              × (∏
                 (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f
                  g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (h
                  i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
                 (y : h ==> i),
                 vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
                 vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                   id2 (id a · f))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                     id2 f)
                    × (∏
                       (a
                        b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (runitor f)
                         (rinvunitor f) =
                       id2 (f · id b))
                      × (∏
                         (a
                          b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (rinvunitor f)
                           (runitor f) = id2 f)
                        × (∏
                           (a b c
                            d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                           vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                             (rassociator f g h) =
                           id2 (f · (g · h)))
                          × (∏
                             (a b c
                              d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                             vcomp2
                               (rassociator f g h)
                               (lassociator f g h) =
                             id2 (f · g · h))
                            × (∏
                               (a b
                                c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                               vcomp2
                                 (lassociator f (id b)
                                    g)
                                 (rwhisker g
                                    (runitor f)) =
                               lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                              × (∏
                                 (a b c d
                                  e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                      ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                                 vcomp2
                                   (vcomp2
                                      (lwhisker f
                                         (lassociator
                                            g h i))
                                      (lassociator f
                                         (g · h) i))
                                   (rwhisker i
                                      (lassociator f g
                                         h)) =
                                 vcomp2
                                   (lassociator f g
                                      (h · i))
                                   (lassociator
                                      (f · g) h i))

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
 lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
   rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
     vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
       vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
           (lassociator f g i) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
           (lwhisker (f · g) x))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g
            h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : g ==> h),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
             (lassociator f h i) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
             (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
               (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
             vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
               (lassociator g h i))
            × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (h
                i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g) 
               (y : h ==> i),
               vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                 id2 (id a · f))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                   id2 f)
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                     id2 (f · id b))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                       b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rinvunitor f) 
                       (runitor f) = 
                       id2 f)
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
rwhisker g (id2 f) = id2 (f · g)
 exact (functor_id tensor (f , g)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
 lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
   rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
     vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
       vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
           (lassociator f g i) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
           (lwhisker (f · g) x))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g
            h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : g ==> h),
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
             (lassociator f h i) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
             (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
               (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
             vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
               (lassociator g h i))
            × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f
                g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (h
                i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧) (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
               vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
               vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
                 id2 (id a · f))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                   id2 f)
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                     id2 (f · id b))
                    × (∏
                       (a
                        b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (rinvunitor f)
                         (runitor f) = id2 f)
                      × (∏
                         (a b c
                          d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                           (rassociator f g h) =
                         id2 (f · (g · h)))
                        × (∏
                           (a b c
                            d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                           vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                             (lassociator f g h) =
                           id2 (f · g · h))
                          × (∏
                             (a b
                              c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                             vcomp2
                               (lassociator f (id b) g)
                               (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                             lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                            × (∏
                               (a b c d
                                e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                    ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                               vcomp2
                                 (vcomp2
                                    (lwhisker f
                                       (lassociator g
                                          h i))
                                    (lassociator f
                                       (g · h) i))
                                 (rwhisker i
                                    (lassociator f g h)) =
                               vcomp2
                                 (lassociator f g
                                    (h · i))
                                 (lassociator (f · g)
                                    h i))


  (* 4. Left whiskering vertical composition. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
 rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
   vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
     vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
         (lassociator f g i) =
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : g ==> h),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
           (lassociator f h i) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
           (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
             (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
           vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
             (lassociator g h i))
          × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (h
              i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g) 
             (y : h ==> i),
             vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
               id2 (id a · f))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                 id2 f)
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                   id2 (f · id b))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                     id2 f)
                    × (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) =
lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) = ?b
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
?b = lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f x) (lwhisker f y) = ?b
 exact (!(functor_comp tensor (id f #, x) (id f #, y))). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
# tensor ((id f #, x) · (id f #, y)) =
lwhisker f (vcomp2 x y)

    exact (maponpaths (fun z => z #⊗ (x · y)) (id_left _)).
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
 rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
   vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
     vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
         (lassociator f g i) =
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : g ==> h),
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
           (lassociator f h i) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
           (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
             (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
           vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
             (lassociator g h i))
          × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f
              g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (h
              i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
             vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
             vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
               id2 (id a · f))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
                 id2 f)
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                   id2 (f · id b))
                  × (∏
                     (a
                      b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                     id2 f)
                    × (∏
                       (a b c
                        d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                         (rassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · (g · h)))
                      × (∏
                         (a b c
                          d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                         vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                           (lassociator f g h) =
                         id2 (f · g · h))
                        × (∏
                           (a b
                            c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                           vcomp2
                             (lassociator f (id b) g)
                             (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                           lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                          × (∏
                             (a b c d
                              e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                  ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                             vcomp2
                               (vcomp2
                                  (lwhisker f
                                     (lassociator g h
                                        i))
                                  (lassociator f
                                     (g · h) i))
                               (rwhisker i
                                  (lassociator f g h)) =
                             vcomp2
                               (lassociator f g
                                  (h · i))
                               (lassociator (f · g) h
                                  i))


  (* 5. Right whiskering vertical composition. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
 vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
   vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
       (lassociator f g i) =
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : g ==> h),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
         (lassociator f h i) =
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
         (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
           (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
         vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
           (lassociator g h i))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (h
            i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g) 
           (y : h ==> i),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
             id2 (id a · f))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
               id2 f)
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                 id2 (f · id b))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                   id2 f)
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                     (h : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                     vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                     id2 (f · (g · h)))
                    × (∏
                       (a b c
                       d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) =
rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) = ?b
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
?b = rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
vcomp2 (rwhisker i x) (rwhisker i y) = ?b
 exact (!(functor_comp tensor _ _)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
# tensor ((x #, id i) · (y #, id i)) =
rwhisker i (vcomp2 x y)

    exact (maponpaths (fun z => (x · y) #⊗ z) (id_left _)).
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
 vcomp2 (lunitor f) x)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
   vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
       (lassociator f g i) =
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : g ==> h),
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
         (lassociator f h i) =
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
         (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
           (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
         vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x)
           (lassociator g h i))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f
            g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (h
            i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
           vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
           vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
             id2 (id a · f))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) =
               id2 f)
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
                 id2 (f · id b))
                × (∏
                   (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                   id2 f)
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                       (rassociator f g h) =
                     id2 (f · (g · h)))
                    × (∏
                       (a b c
                        d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                         (lassociator f g h) =
                       id2 (f · g · h))
                      × (∏
                         (a b
                          c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                         vcomp2
                           (lassociator f (id b) g)
                           (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                         lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                        × (∏
                           (a b c d
                            e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                                ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                           vcomp2
                             (vcomp2
                                (lwhisker f
                                   (lassociator g h i))
                                (lassociator f (g · h)
                                   i))
                             (rwhisker i
                                (lassociator f g h)) =
                           vcomp2
                             (lassociator f g (h · i))
                             (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 6 and 7. Vertical composition and unitors. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
vcomp2 (lunitor f) x
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
 vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
     (lassociator f g i) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : g ==> h),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
       (lassociator f h i) =
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
       (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
         (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
       vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
           id2 (id a · f))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
               id2 (f · id b))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                 id2 f)
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
                   (h : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 
                     (lassociator f g h)
                     (rassociator f g h) =
                   id2 (f · (g · h)))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                     (h : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                     vcomp2 
                       (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                     id2 (f · g · h))
                    × (∏
                       (a b
                       c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × 
                      (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
vcomp2 (lunitor f) x
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 (lwhisker (id a) x) (lunitor g) =
vcomp2 (lunitor f) x
 exact (pr21 l _ _ _). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
 vcomp2 (runitor f) x)
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
     (lassociator f g i) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : g ==> h),
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
       (lassociator f h i) =
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
       (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
         (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
       vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
         vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
         vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
           id2 (id a · f))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
               id2 (f · id b))
              × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
                 id2 f)
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                     (rassociator f g h) =
                   id2 (f · (g · h)))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c
                      d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                       (lassociator f g h) =
                     id2 (f · g · h))
                    × (∏
                       (a b
                        c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                       vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                         (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                      × (∏
                         (a b c d
                          e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                              ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                         vcomp2
                           (vcomp2
                              (lwhisker f
                                 (lassociator g h i))
                              (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                           (rwhisker i
                              (lassociator f g h)) =
                         vcomp2
                           (lassociator f g (h · i))
                           (lassociator (f · g) h i))

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
vcomp2 (runitor f) x
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
   (lassociator f g i) =
 vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : g ==> h),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
     (lassociator f h i) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
     (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
       (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
     vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
