      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
         id2 (id a · f))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
             id2 (f · id b))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
               id2 f)
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f g h)
                   (rassociator f g h) =
                 id2 (f · (g · h)))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
                   (h : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 
                     (rassociator f g h)
                     (lassociator f g h) =
                   id2 (f · g · h))
                  × (∏
                     (a b
                      c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧),
                     vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                     lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                    × (∏
                       (a b c d
                       e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : 
                       prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                       ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
vcomp2 (runitor f) x
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 (rwhisker (id b) x) (runitor g) =
vcomp2 (runitor f) x
 exact (pr21 ρ _ _ _). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x))
   (lassociator f g i) =
 vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x))
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : g ==> h),
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
     (lassociator f h i) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
     (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g),
     vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
       (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
     vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
       vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
       vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
         id2 (id a · f))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
             id2 (f · id b))
            × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) =
               id2 f)
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                   (rassociator f g h) =
                 id2 (f · (g · h)))
                × (∏
                   (a b c
                    d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                     (lassociator f g h) =
                   id2 (f · g · h))
                  × (∏
                     (a b
                      c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                     vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                     lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                    × (∏
                       (a b c d
                        e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                            ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                       vcomp2
                         (vcomp2
                            (lwhisker f
                               (lassociator g h i))
                            (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                         (rwhisker i
                            (lassociator f g h)) =
                       vcomp2
                         (lassociator f g (h · i))
                         (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 8. Associator and left/left whiskering *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x)) (lassociator f g i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : g ==> h),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
   (lassociator f h i) =
 vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
   (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
     (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
   vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
       id2 (id a · f))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
           id2 (f · id b))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                 (rassociator f g h) =
               id2 (f · (g · h)))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                 vcomp2 
                   (rassociator f g h)
                   (lassociator f g h) =
                 id2 (f · g · h))
                × (∏
                   (a b
                    c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2 
                     (lassociator f (id b) g)
                     (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                   lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c d
                      e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                     (g : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                     (h : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧)
                     (i : 
                      prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d,
                      e ⟧),
                     vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                     vcomp2 
                       (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x)) (lassociator f g i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x)) (lassociator f g i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x)

  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x)) (lassociator f g i) =
?b
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
?b = vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lwhisker g x)) (lassociator f g i) =
?b
 exact (pr21 (nat_z_iso_inv α) _ _ ((id f #, id g) #, x)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv α)) ((f, g), h)
· # (assoc_left (pr12 M)) ((id f #, id g) #, x) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (lwhisker (f · g) x)

    exact (maponpaths (fun z => _ · (z #⊗ _)) (functor_id tensor (f , g))).
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : g ==> h),
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x))
   (lassociator f h i) =
 vcomp2 (lassociator f g i)
   (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x)))
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g),
   vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
     (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
   vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
     vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
     vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
       id2 (id a · f))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
           id2 (f · id b))
          × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
                 (rassociator f g h) =
               id2 (f · (g · h)))
              × (∏
                 (a b c
                  d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                   (lassociator f g h) =
                 id2 (f · g · h))
                × (∏
                   (a b
                    c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                   vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                     (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                   lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                  × (∏
                     (a b c d
                      e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                     (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                          ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                     vcomp2
                       (vcomp2
                          (lwhisker f
                             (lassociator g h i))
                          (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                       (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                     vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
                       (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 9. Associator and right/left whiskering *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x)) (lassociator f h i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g i) (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x))
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
   (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
 vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
     id2 (id a · f))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
         id2 (f · id b))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
               (rassociator f g h) = 
             id2 (f · (g · h)))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                 (lassociator f g h) = 
               id2 (f · g · h))
              × (∏
                 (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧),
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f (id b) g)
                   (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                 lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                × (∏
                   (a b c d
                    e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
                   (g : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
                   (h : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧)
                   (i : 
                    prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e
                    ⟧),
                   vcomp2
                     (vcomp2
                       (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                       (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                     (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                   vcomp2 
                     (lassociator f g (h · i))
                     (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h),
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x)) (lassociator f h i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g i) (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x))

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x)) (lassociator f h i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g i) (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x))

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x)) (lassociator f h i) =
?b
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
?b =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g i) (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x))

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
vcomp2 (lwhisker f (rwhisker i x)) (lassociator f h i) =
?b
 exact (pr21 (nat_z_iso_inv α) _ _ ((id f #, x) #, id i)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv α)) ((f, g), i)
· # (assoc_left (pr12 M)) ((id f #, x) #, id i) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g i) (rwhisker i (lwhisker f x))

    apply idpath.
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g),
 vcomp2 (lassociator f h i)
   (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
 vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i))
× (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
   vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
   vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) =
     id2 (id a · f))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
         id2 (f · id b))
        × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
           vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
               (rassociator f g h) = id2 (f · (g · h)))
            × (∏
               (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
                 (lassociator f g h) = id2 (f · g · h))
              × (∏
                 (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧),
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                   (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
                 lwhisker f (lunitor g))
                × (∏
                   (a b c d
                    e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ c, d ⟧)
                   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal
                        ⟦ d, e ⟧),
                   vcomp2
                     (vcomp2
                        (lwhisker f
                           (lassociator g h i))
                        (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                     (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                   vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
                     (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 10. Associator and right/right whiskering *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (lassociator f h i) (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
       id2 (f · id b))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
             (rassociator f g h) = 
           id2 (f · (g · h)))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
             vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
               (lassociator f g h) = 
             id2 (f · g · h))
            × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                 (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
               lwhisker f (lunitor g))
              × (∏
                 (a b c d
                  e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d,
                      e ⟧),
                 vcomp2
                   (vcomp2
                      (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                      (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                   (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                 vcomp2 
                   (lassociator f g (h · i))
                   (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
vcomp2 (lassociator f h i) (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i)

    
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 (lassociator f h i) (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i)

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
vcomp2 (lassociator f h i) (rwhisker i (rwhisker h x)) =
?b
 exact (!(pr21 (nat_z_iso_inv α) _ _ ((x #, id h) #, id i))). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
# (assoc_right (pr12 M)) ((x #, id h) #, id i)
· (pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv α)) ((g, h), i) =
vcomp2 (rwhisker (h · i) x) (lassociator g h i)

    exact (maponpaths (fun z => (_ #⊗ z) · _) (functor_id tensor (h , i))).
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
 vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
 vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
       id2 (f · id b))
      × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
             (rassociator f g h) = id2 (f · (g · h)))
          × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
             vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
               (lassociator f g h) = id2 (f · g · h))
            × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
                 (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
               lwhisker f (lunitor g))
              × (∏
                 (a b c d
                  e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
                 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a,
                      b ⟧)
                 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b,
                      c ⟧)
                 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c,
                      d ⟧)
                 (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d,
                      e ⟧),
                 vcomp2
                   (vcomp2
                      (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                      (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                   (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
                 vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
                   (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 11. Vertical composition and whiskering *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
     id2 (f · id b))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
           (rassociator f g h) = 
         id2 (f · (g · h)))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
           vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
             (lassociator f g h) = 
           id2 (f · g · h))
          × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
               (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
             lwhisker f (lunitor g))
            × (∏
               (a b c d
                e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2
                 (vcomp2
                    (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                    (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                 (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
                 (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) =
vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) = ?b

pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
?b = vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)

pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (rwhisker h x) (lwhisker g y) = ?b
 exact (!(functor_comp tensor _ _)).

pM:= M: category

# tensor
  (pr1 (x #, id h) · pr1 (id g #, y)

pM:= M: category

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
?b = vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
# tensor
  (pr1 (x #, id h) · pr1 (id g #, y)
  #, pr2 (id g #, y)) = ?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => (z #⊗ _)) (id_right _)).

# tensor (pr1 (x #, id h) #, pr2 (id g #, y)) =
vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x)

ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr222 M))

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
vcomp2 (lwhisker f y) (rwhisker i x) = ?b
 exact (!(functor_comp tensor _ _)).

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
# tensor
  (pr1 (x #, id i)
  #, pr2 (id f #, y) · pr2 (x #, id i)) = ?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => (_ #⊗ z)) (id_right _)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f, g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: h ==> i
# tensor (pr1 (x #, id i) #, pr2 (id f #, y)) =
# tensor (pr1 (x #, id h) #, pr2 (id g #, y))

    apply idpath.
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) =
     id2 (f · id b))
    × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g h)
           (rassociator f g h) = id2 (f · (g · h)))
        × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
           vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
             (lassociator f g h) = id2 (f · g · h))
          × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
             vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
               (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
             lwhisker f (lunitor g))
            × (∏
               (a b c d
                e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
               (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b
                    ⟧)
               (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c
                    ⟧)
               (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d
                    ⟧)
               (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e
                    ⟧),
               vcomp2
                 (vcomp2
                    (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                    (lassociator f (g · h) i))
                 (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
               vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
                 (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 12. Left unitor invertible. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
       id2 (f · (g · h)))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
         vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
           (lassociator f g h) = 
         id2 (f · g · h))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
             (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
           lwhisker f (lunitor g))
          × (∏
             (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
             vcomp2
               (vcomp2
                  (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                  (lassociator f (g · h) i))
               (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
               (lassociator (f · g) h i))

pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))

(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f)

I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
vcomp2 (lunitor f) (linvunitor f) = id2 (id a · f)
 exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (l f,, pr2 l f)).

I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M

(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (linvunitor f) (lunitor f) = id2 f)
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b))
  × (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
     vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
       id2 (f · (g · h)))
      × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
         vcomp2 (rassociator f g h)
           (lassociator f g h) = id2 (f · g · h))
        × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
           vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
             (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
           lwhisker f (lunitor g))
          × (∏
             (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
             (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
             (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
             (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
             vcomp2
               (vcomp2
                  (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                  (lassociator f (g · h) i))
               (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
             vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
               (lassociator (f · g) h i))

  (pr122 (pr222 M))

I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
     id2 (f · (g · h)))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
       vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
       id2 (f · g · h))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
           (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
         lwhisker f (lunitor g))
        × (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
           vcomp2
             (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                (lassociator f (g · h) i))
             (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
             (lassociator (f · g) h i))
