M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b))
× (∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
     vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
     id2 (f · (g · h)))
    × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
       vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
       id2 (f · g · h))
      × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
         vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
           (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
         lwhisker f (lunitor g))
        × (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
           (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
           vcomp2
             (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
                (lassociator f (g · h) i))
             (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
           vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
             (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 13. Right unitor invertible. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
   id2 (f · (g · h)))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
     vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
     id2 (f · g · h))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
         (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
      × (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
         vcomp2
           (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
              (lassociator f (g · h) i))
           (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
           (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
vcomp2 (runitor f) (rinvunitor f) = id2 (f · id b)
 exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (ρ f,, pr2 ρ f)). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 vcomp2 (rinvunitor f) (runitor f) = id2 f)
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
   id2 (f · (g · h)))
  × (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
     (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
     vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
     id2 (f · g · h))
    × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
         (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
       lwhisker f (lunitor g))
      × (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
         (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
         (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
         vcomp2
           (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
              (lassociator f (g · h) i))
           (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
         vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
           (lassociator (f · g) h i))

  (pr122 (pr222 M))

l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))

 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 vcomp2 (lassociator f g h) (rassociator f g h) =
 id2 (f · (g · h)))
× (∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
   id2 (f · g · h))
  × (∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
     (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
       (rwhisker g (runitor f)) =
     lwhisker f (lunitor g))
    × (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
       (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
       (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
       (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
       vcomp2
         (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
            (lassociator f (g · h) i))
         (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
       vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
         (lassociator (f · g) h i))

 lwhisker f (lunitor g))
× (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
   vcomp2
     (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
        (lassociator f (g · h) i))
     (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
     (lassociator (f · g) h i))
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧),
vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
id2 (f · g · h)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
vcomp2 (rassociator f g h) (lassociator f g h) =
id2 (f · g · h)
 exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (α ((f, g), h) ,, pr2 α ((f, g), h) )). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
(∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
 (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
   (rwhisker g (runitor f)) = lwhisker f (lunitor g))
× (∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
   (f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
   (i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
   vcomp2
     (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
        (lassociator f (g · h) i))
     (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
   vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
     (lassociator (f · g) h i))


  (* 15. Right unitor whiskering. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧),
vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
  (rwhisker g (runitor f)) = lwhisker f (lunitor g)
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
vcomp2
  (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
     (lassociator f (g · h) i))
  (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
  (lassociator (f · g) h i)

a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
vcomp2 (lassociator f (id b) g)
  (rwhisker g (runitor f)) = ?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => _ · z) (triangle_equality _ _)).

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
id assoc_right (pr12 M) ((f, I), g)
· # (pr12 M) (id f #, (pr112 (pr22 M)) g) =
lwhisker f (lunitor g)

    exact (id_left _).
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏ (a b c d e : prebicat_data_from_monoidal)
(f : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧),
vcomp2
  (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
     (lassociator f (g · h) i))
  (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
  (lassociator (f · g) h i)


  (* 16. Pentagon equation *)
  (* The pentagon equation is backwards on the definition of bicategory and in the definition of
  monoidal category, we need to rewrite the equation in order to apply it. *)
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
vcomp2
  (vcomp2 (lwhisker f (lassociator g h i))
     (lassociator f (g · h) i))
  (rwhisker i (lassociator f g h)) =
vcomp2 (lassociator f g (h · i))
  (lassociator (f · g) h i)

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
# tensor
  (id f #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i))
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h ⊗ i))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i))

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
· (# tensor
     (id f
     #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i))
   · # tensor
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h))
       #, id i)) =
α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h ⊗ i))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)))

f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧

h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
   · (# tensor
        (id f
        #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h ⊗ i))
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)))) =
?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)).

  (pr122 (pr222 M))

a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h ⊗ i))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i))) =
?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => _ · (z · _)) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (α ((f, g), _) ,, pr2 α _ ))). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (id assoc_left (pr12 M)
        ((f, g),
        (pr111 (pr2 M))
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc (pr1 M)
                (pr1 M) (pr1 M) ((f ⊗ g, h), i))))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i))) =
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
   · (# tensor
        (id f
        #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i))
      · # tensor
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h))
          #, id i)))

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i)
· (id assoc_left (pr12 M)
        ((f, g),
        (pr111 (pr2 M))
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc (pr1 M)
                (pr1 M) (pr1 M) ((f ⊗ g, h), i))))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f ⊗ g, h), i))) =
?b

· (id assoc_left (pr12 M)
        ((f, g),
        (pr111 (pr2 M))

 exact (maponpaths (fun z => _ · z) (id_left _)).

   · (# tensor

pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i) · α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
· (# tensor
     (id f
     #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i))
   · # tensor
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h))
       #, id i)) = ?b
 exact (assoc _ _ _). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i) · α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
· (# tensor
     (id f
     #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i)))
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
id assoc_left (pr12 M) ((f ⊗ g, h), i)

a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
α ((f ⊗ g, h), i) · α ((f, g), h ⊗ i)
· (# tensor
     (id f
     #, is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((g, h), i)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i)))
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => (z · _) · _) (pentagon_equation _ _ _ _)).

  ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)
· (pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, (pr12 M) (g, h)), i)

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
# (pr12 M)
  ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)
· (pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, (pr12 M) (g, h)), i)
· (# tensor
     (id f #, id assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i)))
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
?b
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))

i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
?b = id (pr12 M) ((pr12 M) (f ⊗ g, h), i)

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
# (pr12 M)
  ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)
· ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, (pr12 M) (g, h)), i)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g ⊗ h), i)))
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => (_ · z · _)) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (α ((f,g ⊗ h),i) ,, pr2 α _))). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))

f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧

h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧

aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
# (pr12 M)
  ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)
· id assoc_left (pr12 M) ((f, g ⊗ h), i)
· # tensor
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h)) #, id i) =
id (pr12 M) ((pr12 M) (f ⊗ g, h), i)

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
?b = id (pr12 M) ((pr12 M) (f ⊗ g, h), i)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
# tensor
  (pr1 ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)
   · pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α ((f, g), h))
       #, id i)
  #, pr2 ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)) =
?b
 exact (maponpaths (fun z => (z #⊗ _)) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (α ((f,g),h) ,, pr2 α _))). 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b, c, d, e: prebicat_data_from_monoidal
f: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: prebicat_data_from_monoidal ⟦ d, e ⟧
aux: # tensor
  (id (f, assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))) =
id (f ⊗ assoc_left (pr12 M) ((g, h), i))
# tensor
  (id assoc_left (pr12 M) ((f, g), h)
  #, pr2 ((pr112 (pr222 (pr2 M))) ((f, g), h) #, id i)) =
id (pr12 M) ((pr12 M) (f ⊗ g, h), i)

  apply (functor_id tensor).
Qed.

Definition prebicat_from_monoidal : prebicat :=
  prebicat_data_from_monoidal ,, prebicat_laws_from_monoidal.


M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
bicat

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)

M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category

 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
isaset_cells (?C,, ?HC1)

  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M

l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
prebicat_data
 exact prebicat_data_from_monoidal.
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)

  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))

         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))

 exact prebicat_laws_from_monoidal.
  
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
isaset_cells
  (prebicat_data_from_monoidal,,
   prebicat_laws_from_monoidal)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
∏
(a
 b : prebicat_data_from_monoidal,,
     prebicat_laws_from_monoidal)
(f
 g : (prebicat_data_from_monoidal,,
      prebicat_laws_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
isaset (f ==> g)
 
M: monoidal_cat
pM:= M: category
I:= monoidal_cat_unit M: pr1 M
tensor:= monoidal_cat_tensor M: pr1 M ⊠ pr1 M ⟶ pr1 M
α:= monoidal_cat_associator M: associator (pr12 M)
l:= monoidal_cat_left_unitor M: left_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
ρ:= monoidal_cat_right_unitor M: right_unitor (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
triangle_equality:= pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)): triangle_eq (pr12 M) (pr122 M)
  (pr122 (pr2 M)) (pr122 (pr22 M))
  (pr122 (pr222 M))
pentagon_equation:= pr222 (pr222 (pr2 M)): (λ _ : triangle_eq (pr12 M)
         (pr122 M) (pr122 (pr2 M))
         (pr122 (pr22 M))
         (pr122 (pr222 M)),
 pentagon_eq (pr12 M)
   (pr122 (pr222 M)))
  (pr122 (pr222 (pr2 M)))
a, b: prebicat_data_from_monoidal,,
prebicat_laws_from_monoidal
f, g: (prebicat_data_from_monoidal,,
 prebicat_laws_from_monoidal) ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaset (f ==> g)
 apply homset_property.
Defined.

End Bicat_From_Monoidal_Cat.
